title: trophaeum umbellatum
intro: Trophaeum umbellatum, also known as the umbrella flower or trophoës, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trophaeum umbellatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Trophaeum umbellatum typically involve infusions, tinctures, or essential oils, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
